versions.version_description: This is a version to play the song, it works perfect on the piano as well. You just need to find the vibe and improvise a bit.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
chords
[ch]Am/D[/ch]  xx0210
[ch]Em7[/ch]   xx2430

[Intro]
[ch]Am/D[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]Am/D[/ch]
Yeah, you got that yummy-yum[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em7[/ch]
That yummy-yum, that yummy-yummy[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am/D[/ch]
Yeah, you got that yummy-yum[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]
Any night, any day[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch]
In the mornin' or the late[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]Am/D[/ch]
Bonafide stallion[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em7[/ch]
It ain't no stable, no, you stay on the run[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am/D[/ch]
Ain't on the side, you're number one[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em7[/ch]
Yeah, every time I come around, you get it done (You get it done)[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am/D[/ch]
Fifty-fifty, love the way you split it[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em7[/ch] 
Hundred racks, help me spend it, babe[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]
Light a match, get litty, babe[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am/D[/ch]
That jet set, watch the sunset kinda, Yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]                                 N.C.
Rollin' eyes back in my head, make my toes curl, yeah, yeah[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]

Lost control of myself, I'm compromised[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am/D[/ch]
You're incriminating, no disguise (No disguise)[/tab]
